Q1 2026 showed +5% revenue growth and a 30% operating margin, extending profitability while signalling a slower top-line cadence. With debt-to-equity at 1.5 and the share price mid-band of its 52-week range, valuation discipline is the operative variable; the composite score of 70 reflects that balance."},"disclaimer":"This narrative is automatically generated from structured financial data and is for informational purposes only; it is not investment advice.","forwardEstimates":{"forwardPE":28,"earningsGrowthForward":0.05,"revenueGrowthForward":0.05,"ebitdaGrowthForward":null,"analystConsensus":"buy","confidenceLevel":"medium","reasoning":"Q1 2026 revenue grew 5% YoY with a 30% operating margin extending the recent trend; only one quarter is supplied so confidence is medium.
